summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected; all five open PRs are independent maintainer-queue items and none has fresh evidence supporting close, label, merge, fix, or security routing in this shard.

actions.reason: Independent broad feature PR. Keep open in normal maintainer/author workflow; no close or merge action is justified by this inventory shard.

Independent small docs/metadata attribution PR. Keep open for maintainer review; there is no duplicate, supersession, low-signal close permission, or merge path in this plan.
Independent focused bug-fix PR ready for maintainer review. Keep open; this inventory shard should not close or merge it.
